evidence.claim: The system allocates the next available slot for an emergency flight.
evidence.fact: The system immediately gives a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot.
evidence.user_story_span: the system to handle emergency flights by immediately allocating the next available slot
evidence.fact_span: The system immediately gives a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot.

evidence.claim: The emergency flight is placed at the front of the queue in the next available slot.
evidence.fact: The system immediately gives a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot.
evidence.user_story_span: the emergency flight is placed at the front of the queue (in the next available slot)
evidence.fact_span: The system immediately gives a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot.

evidence.claim: Slot allocation for emergencies happens automatically.
evidence.fact: When an emergency is declared, the system instantly frees up a slot and reorders other flights to accommodate it.
evidence.fact_span: the system instantly frees up a slot and reorders other flights to accommodate it.

evidence.claim: The system maintains a queue of scheduled flights with assigned slots.
evidence.fact: This system assigns departure and arrival slots while enforcing a minimum separation interval between consecutive uses of the same runway.
evidence.user_story_span: The system maintains a queue of scheduled flights with assigned slots.
evidence.fact_span: This system assigns departure and arrival slots while enforcing a minimum separation interval between consecutive uses of the same runway.

evidence.claim: The system re-queues all other affected flights in order with adjusted slots.
evidence.fact: When an emergency is declared, the system instantly frees up a slot and reorders other flights to accommodate it.
evidence.user_story_span: all other previously queued flights are re-queued in order with adjusted slots
evidence.fact_span: the system instantly frees up a slot and reorders other flights to accommodate it.

evidence.fact: The system immediately gives a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot.
evidence.fact_span: The system immediately gives a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot.

evidence.claim: Re-queuing affected flights may shift their departure or arrival times.
